title: PolySurface
description: PolySurface: A composite surface constructed by combining a collection of surfaces of any type. Whole PolySurface integrity, continuity and closure is not guaranteed at creation. Discontinuous and/or multi-region definitions are possible, although validity of some engine methods may vary depending on the PolySurface form.

Surfaces.description: A collection of surfaces, of any or mixed type, which together define the composite shape.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
